questions.question: Insert three records into the EMPLOYEETABLE using INSERT INTO statement. Ensure that each record has attributes EMPNO,ENAME, JOB, MANAGER_NO, SAL, COMMISSION. Use rollback at the end of the SQL statement. Also, include a comment explaining the purpose of the INSERT statement. (Marks: 10)

Design a SQL statement to insert three records into the EMPLOYEETABLE. The records should have EMPNO=101, EMPNO=102, and EMPNO=103, with corresponding attributes values. Use rollback and include a comment to explain the purpose of the INSERT statement. (Marks: 10)
questions.hint: Optional hint for short answer question

questions.question: Write a SQL statement to insert the following records into the EMPLOYEETABLE: EMPNO=500,ENAME='Raj', JOB='Manager', MANAGER_NO=100, SAL=50000, COMMISSION=10000. Also, use rollback at the end of the statement. Include a comment to explain the purpose of the INSERT statement. (Marks: 15)
